scripts.deploy:cf: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$target = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'fleetpro-pages-dist'; if (Test-Path $target) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $target }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $target | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist\*' $target; $fnDst = Join-Path $target 'functions\api'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $fnDst 'notify') -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $fnDst 'payment') -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\notify\telegram.ts' (Join-Path $fnDst 'notify\telegram.ts'); Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\track.js' (Join-Path $fnDst 'track.js'); Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\payment\*' (Join-Path $fnDst 'payment\'); Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'functions\api\[[route]].ts' -Destination (Join-Path $fnDst '[[route]].ts'); Set-Location $target; npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name fleetpro-app --branch main --commit-dirty=true"
scripts.deploy:cf:fast: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$target = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'fleetpro-pages-dist'; if (Test-Path $target) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $target }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $target | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist\*' $target; $fnDst = Join-Path $target 'functions\api'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $fnDst 'notify') -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $fnDst 'payment') -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\notify\telegram.ts' (Join-Path $fnDst 'notify\telegram.ts'); Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\track.js' (Join-Path $fnDst 'track.js'); Copy-Item -Force 'functions\api\payment\*' (Join-Path $fnDst 'payment\'); Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'functions\api\[[route]].ts' -Destination (Join-Path $fnDst '[[route]].ts'); Set-Location $target; npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name fleetpro-app --branch main --commit-dirty=true --skip-caching"
scripts.deploy:cf:prod: npm run build && npm run deploy:cf
scripts.deploy:cf:prod:fast: npm run build && npm run deploy:cf:fast
scripts.qa:release-mobile: npm run typecheck && npm run qa:mobile-ui
scripts.qa:release-mobile-pro: npm run typecheck && npm run qa:mobile-menu-detailed
